articles.title: ‘You should’ve been a Celtic’: Julius Erving on Red Auerbach, rivalry with the Celtics
articles.description:
"He didn't say, 'You've got a great game' or anything, nothing complimentary. It was just, 'You should've been a Celtic.'"

The post ‘You should’ve been a Celtic’: Julius Erving on Red Auerbach, rivalry with the Celtics appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Julius Erving recalls Red Auerbach's remark, highlighting Celtics' historical rivalry.
Erving's comment reflects on the competitive spirit between the Celtics and 76ers.
Local fans appreciate the legacy of Celtics' rivalries in Boston's sports culture.

articles.title: Boston named finalist to host 2028 Democratic National Convention
articles.description:
Party officials will conduct site visits in Boston and four other cities this spring before making a final decision on the 2028 convention.

The post Boston named finalist to host 2028 Democratic National Convention appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston is a finalist to host the 2028 Democratic National Convention.
Site visits by party officials will occur this spring in five cities.
Hosting could boost local economy and tourism for Boston residents.

summary: Fourteen Massachusetts hospitals ranked among the world's best by Newsweek.
Two Boston-area hospitals placed in the top 20 globally.
Local residents benefit from high-quality healthcare services and recognition.
